explain: 17 × 23 = 391. 19 × 21 = 399. Since 399 > 391, Quantity B is greater. (Both are products of pairs that sum to 40; the pair closer together gives the larger product.)
30% of 80 = 0.30 × 80 = 24. 80% of 30 = 0.80 × 30 = 24. Because a% of b equals b% of a, the two quantities are equal.

q: What is 3/4 + 2/3 ?
explain: Common denominator 12: 3/4 = 9/12 and 2/3 = 8/12. Sum = 17/12. So the answer is 17/12.

q: What is the value of 2<sup>10</sup> ?
If 3(x − 2) = 15, what is the value of x ?
A rectangle has length 12 and width 5. What is the length of its diagonal?
explain: The diagonal is the hypotenuse of a right triangle with legs 12 and 5: √(122 + 52) = √(144 + 25) = √169 = 13.

q: A fair six-sided die is rolled once. What is the probability of rolling an even number?
explain: Even outcomes are 2, 4, 6 — 3 of the 6 equally likely faces. P = 3/6 = 1/2.

q: What is the arithmetic mean (average) of the numbers 4, 8, 15, 16, 23, and 42 ?
What is the greatest integer value of x for which 2x − 3 < 7 ?
explain: 2x − 3 < 7 → 2x < 10 → x < 5. The greatest integer strictly less than 5 is 4.

q: What is the slope of the line passing through the points (2, 3) and (6, 11) ?
A train travels at a constant speed of 60 miles per hour. How many miles does it travel in 3.5 hours?
explain: Distance = rate × time = 60 × 3.5 = 210 miles.

q: The price of an item is first increased by 20% and then the resulting price is decreased by 20%. Compared with the original price, the final price has
explain: Let the original price be 100. After +20%: 120. After −20% of 120: 120 × 0.80 = 96. The final price 96 is 4 less than 100, a net decrease of 4%. The two 20% changes do not cancel because they apply to different bases.
(23)2 = 26 = 64. 2(32) = 29 = 512. Since 512 > 64, Quantity B is greater.

q: If x + y = 10 and x − y = 4, what is the value of xy ?
explain: Adding the equations: 2x = 14 → x = 7. Then y = 3. So xy = 7 × 3 = 21.
Area = πr2 = π × 72 = 49π. Since 49π < 50π, Quantity B is greater.
2/5 of 200 = 80. 3/8 of 200 = 75. Since 80 > 75, Quantity A is greater.

q: If 3x + 2y = 16 and x − y = −3, what is the value of x ?
explain: From x − y = −3, x = y − 3. Substitute: 3(y − 3) + 2y = 16 → 5y − 9 = 16 → y = 5. Then x = 5 − 3 = 2.

q: Two fair six-sided dice are rolled. What is the probability that the sum of the two numbers showing is 7 ?
explain: Of 36 equally likely outcomes, the sums of 7 are (1,6),(2,5),(3,4),(4,3),(5,2),(6,1) — 6 outcomes. P = 6/36 = 1/6.

q: The list of numbers is 3, 7, 7, 9, 12. Which of the following values are greater than the mean of the list? Indicate all such values.
explain: Mean = (3 + 7 + 7 + 9 + 12) ÷ 5 = 38 ÷ 5 = 7.6. Values greater than 7.6 are 8, 9, and 12. (3 and 7 are not greater than 7.6.)

q: Working alone, machine A can complete a job in 4 hours and machine B can complete the same job in 6 hours. Working together at their constant rates, how long will they take to complete one job?
explain: Combined rate = 1/4 + 1/6 = 5/12 of the job per hour. Time = 1 ÷ (5/12) = 12/5 = 2.4 hours.

q: What is the least common multiple of 12 and 18 ?
explain: 12 = 22 × 3 and 18 = 2 × 32. The LCM takes the highest power of each prime: 22 × 32 = 36.

q: If 3<sup>x</sup> = 81, what is the value of 3<sup>(x + 1)</sup> ?
explain: 81 = 34, so x = 4 and 3(x + 1) = 35 = 243. (Equivalently 3(x+1) = 3 × 3x = 3 × 81 = 243.)

q: What is the distance between the points (1, 2) and (4, 6) in the xy-plane?

explain: Within −3 < x < 5, |x| can be 0 (x = 0, less than 4) or 4.5 (x = 4.5, greater than 4). Since |x| can be less than or greater than 4, the relationship cannot be determined.

q: What is 15% of 200 ?
If x<sup>2</sup> − 5x + 6 = 0, what is the sum of all values of x that satisfy the equation?
explain: Factor: (x − 2)(x − 3) = 0, so x = 2 or x = 3, and their sum is 5. (Sum of roots = −b/a = 5.)

info: In a triangle, two of the interior angles measure 40° and 60°.
qa: The measure of the third interior angle
explain: The interior angles sum to 180°, so the third angle = 180° − 40° − 60° = 80°. Since 80° > 75°, Quantity A is greater.

q: What is the value of (1/2) ÷ (1/3) ?
explain: Dividing by a fraction means multiplying by its reciprocal: (1/2) ÷ (1/3) = (1/2) × 3 = 3/2.

q: A committee of 2 people is to be chosen from a group of 5 people: P, Q, R, S, and T. Which of the following statements are true? Indicate all that apply.
choices: There are exactly 10 different possible committees.
There are exactly 20 different possible committees.
Person P is on exactly 4 of the possible committees.
The number of committees that do NOT include P is 6.
The probability that a randomly chosen committee includes P is 2/5.
explain: Total committees = C(5,2) = 10, so the first statement is true and the second is false. P pairs with each of the other 4 people, so P is on 4 committees (third true), leaving 10 − 4 = 6 committees without P (fourth true). Probability a committee includes P = 4/10 = 2/5 (fifth true). The true statements are the first, third, fourth, and fifth.

q: If 5 identical pens cost $7.50, how many dollars do 8 of the same pens cost?
explain: Each pen costs $7.50 ÷ 5 = $1.50. Eight pens cost 8 × $1.50 = $12.

q: What is the standard deviation of the data set 2, 2, 2, 2 ?
explain: All four values are identical, so each equals the mean (2) and there is no spread. The standard deviation is 0.

q: Which of the following points lie on the line y = 2x + 1 ? Indicate all such points.
What is the value of √144 ?

explain: (x + 1)2 = x2 + 2x + 1. Quantity A − Quantity B = 2x. Since x > 0, 2x > 0, so Quantity A is always larger. Quantity A is greater.

q: If 2x + 3 = 11, what is the value of x ?
A cube has edge length 3. What is its total surface area?
explain: A cube has 6 square faces, each of area 32 = 9. Total surface area = 6 × 9 = 54.

q: 40 is what percent of 160 ? (Enter the number of percent, omitting the % sign.)

info: A bag contains 3 red marbles and 2 blue marbles. One marble is drawn at random.
qa: The probability that the marble drawn is red
explain: There are 5 marbles, 3 red, so P(red) = 3/5 = 0.6 > 0.5. Quantity A is greater.

q: The average (arithmetic mean) of 5 numbers is 20. Four of the numbers are 18, 22, 19, and 21. What is the fifth number?
explain: Sum of all 5 = 5 × 20 = 100. The four known numbers sum to 18 + 22 + 19 + 21 = 80. Fifth number = 100 − 80 = 20.

q: What is the value of 0.25 × 0.4 ?
